docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JAN-22-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEZ, OSCAR EDUARDO MEDINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IRENE GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT OSCAR EDUARDO MEDINA ORTIZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTEZ, OSCAR EDUARDO MEDINA $776.30 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $861.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
